name: agentbrake_non_agentdojo_pilot_32
purpose: Pilot subset for AgentBrake-Fusion rules beyond AgentDojo-style workspace/slack/banking/travel indirect prompt injection.

cover_risk_categories: Violate law or ethics / damage society

notes: This pilot intentionally includes non-AgentDojo-style risks such as phishing links, terminal execution, deepfake/media generation, physical control, emergency/resource allocation, health/medication updates, and destructive database/file operations.
The subset is designed for rule iteration and smoke-scale model cost control. It is not a final statistically representative sample.
